resources.string: Please set both removal and insertion dates.
Removal date must be before insertion date.
The time period is too short for the selected options.
To Base: Removed Europe, inserted LV

Before inserting your tacho card the tachograph's language must be set to english 
1.Press the [▲] button 2 times.
2."Choose a language?"->Press [OK]. 
3.Using the [▲/▼] buttons choose "Language English"->Press [OK] 
4. Insert your tacho card and wait
5."1M entry addition" -> Press [OK].

STEP %1$d:
- Select %2$s using [▲/▼] -> Press [OK]
- Set Date to %3$s using [▲/▼] -> Press [OK]
- Set Time to %4$s using [▲/▼] -> Press [OK]

At this point, you can review all entries. Use the [↩] button if you need to correct anything.

Final steps:
- "Start country" -> Select using [▲/▼] -> Press [OK] 
-"1M confirm entry?" -> Press [OK]. 
- "Publish ITS data?" -> Press [OK]. 
- "Publish VDO data?" -> Press [OK].
Now you must wait for the data to finish loading and then you can start working!
